task.objective: three.js production pack per ADR-0009 (supervisor-requested items 1-5): material textures with embedded PNGs and alpha-masked leaf-atlas cards (schema 1.3.0), MikkTSpace-style tangents, _WIND_ANCHOR/_WIND_PARAMS vertex channels with a matching three.js shader module, one-command LOD chain bake with a THREE.LOD assembly helper, billboard impostor baker, crown AO deferred, textured diagnostic renderer, and full docs/samples updates.

outputs: src/document: Material.textures + card_region (schema 1.3.0), project_root, traversal-safe URI validation
src/evaluation: textured card leaves (2 tris/leaf, atlas-region UVs)
src/export: tangent generation + wind channels in mesh_merge; GLB texture embedding, TANGENT/_WIND accessors, alphaMode MASK; MTL map_Kd with asset copy; bake_lods preset + combined LOD manifest
docs/integrations/three_js.md rewritten around the textured GLB/wind/LOD workflow

validation.result: 100% tests passed (16 suites) on both presets, incl. texture roundtrip + traversal rejection, card leaf counts/UV ranges, GLB tangent/wind/texture structure, missing-asset diagnostics, LOD bake integration test

TANGENT and _wind_anchor/_wind_params load in three.js's own loader; texture structure validated at GLB level (PNG magic at image bufferViews, MASK alphaMode) since Node lacks browser image decode; browsers load natively
card foliage halves budgets (oak 104k->38k, fir 220k->89k tris; grove 443k->197k; runtime forest 1.8M->793k); impostors ~60-100KB per species at 12 triangles

risks: Sample textures are procedural placeholders; the full 12_MATERIALS pipeline (photogrammetry, mips, compression) is separate work
Baked crown AO (COLOR_0) descoped from this change after review of value vs. schedule; tracked for the 14_LOD pass
Impostors are single-sprite crossed quads (diagnostic grade); view-dependent atlases arrive with 14_LOD
Node-based texture load verification is structural; browser GLTFLoader performs the actual image decode
